name: quotabar
description: Claude Code statusline for Claude Code and Codex usage limits.

interface.shortDescription: Show Claude Code and Codex usage limits in your statusline.
interface.longDescription: quotabar is a lightweight Claude Code statusline that displays 5-hour and weekly quota usage for Claude Code and local Codex sessions, plus context, model, and session cost. The Codex plugin metadata makes the project discoverable in Codex; run the installer from the README to wire the Claude Code statusline.
defaultPrompt: Help me install quotabar for Claude Code.
Show me how quotabar reads Codex usage limits.
